description: GoPay is a comprehensive B2B billing and collection ecosystem designed to streamline payment processes, drive cash flow visibility, and ensure regulatory compliance in Saudi Arabia. Below are the key products and their business value:

gopay.title: GoPay - Core Collections Platform
gopay.description: GoPay is the flagship SADAD-integrated solution for issuing invoices and collecting payments across all sectors. It empowers SMEs, enterprises, and government entities to automate their receivables and simplify reconciliation.
features: Single integration to SADAD (national bill payment rail)
Automated payment references and real-time reconciliation
SMS/email reminders to reduce overdue invoices

golnvoice.title: Golnvoice - ZATCA-Compliant E-Invoicing
golnvoice.description: Golnvoice enables organizations to issue, archive, and report VAT-compliant invoices in line with ZATCA Phase 1 and 2. It serves as the digital invoice engine within GoPay's ecosystem.
features: Supports independent professionals and enterprises alike

gosplit.title: GoSplit - Multi-Payout Mechanism
gosplit.description: For marketplaces, gig platforms, or commission-based models, GoSplit distributes funds to multiple beneficiaries in real-time with full traceability and rule-based logic.

goonline.title: GoOnline - E-commerce Gateway (via Partnerships)
goonline.description: GoOnline allows merchants to accept digital payments online using a secure and scalable gateway. Integrated via our payment partners, it supports subscription models and checkout flows.
features: Supports independent professionals and enterprises alike

gopayPlus.title: GoPay+ - Enterprise Financial Orchestration
gopayPlus.description: GoPay+ is a corporate-grade automation layer that digitizes and unifies receivables, payments, and reconciliation into a single regulated workflow. Ideal for businesses managing large-scale B2B billing, milestone payments, and trade finance.
features: Context-aware invoicing: Handles milestones, penalties, partials
Consolidated dashboard for receivables & cash flow
Secure, API-driven integration with accounting and banking systems

solutions.description: Discover how GoPay can transform your business

multiplePaymentModes.title: Multiple Payment Modes
multiplePaymentModes.description: Enables issuing various types of invoices (one-time or recurring) with payment methods tailored to the business type and services offered.

integratedDashboard.title: Integrated Dashboard
integratedDashboard.description: The platform offers a fully integrated control panel with detailed insights across all transactions to help manage operations and make informed decisions efficiently.

certifiedEInvoicing.title: Certified E-Invoicing
certifiedEInvoicing.description: Allows businesses to create structured, compliant electronic invoices in line with ZATCA regulations, suitable for multiple use cases and sectors.

customSenderId.title: Custom Sender ID (SMS/Email)
customSenderId.description: Allows customizing the sender name on notifications, matching the brand identity of the business.

payoutDistribution.title: Payout & Distribution
payoutDistribution.description: Flexible options for managing collected funds, whether to distribute, retain, or transfer to bank accounts.

realTimeTracking.title: Real-Time Tracking & Alerts
realTimeTracking.description: The system tracks all issued invoices in real-time, from creation to payment collection, and supports automated notifications and reminders.

directSystemIntegration.title: Direct System Integration
directSystemIntegration.description: Offers technical API integration between GoPay and third-party systems to streamline invoicing and payment processes.

customInvoiceDesign.title: Custom Invoice Design
customInvoiceDesign.description: Businesses can customize invoice layouts and fields based on industry needs, service types, and preferred formats.
